name: Dried-Cherry Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Dried cherries (less than a 3-ounce package); chopped
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: St. Louis Post-Dispatch, March 31, 1997.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a baking sheet lightly.
In a large bowl, mix together the flour, sugar, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
Add eggs and vanilla; beat until a dough forms. Stir in cherries and almonds.
Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and knead several times.
Place on prepared baking sheet and shape into two long logs, each about 9 inches long and 3 inches wide.
Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned on top. Remove from oven and let cool on the rack for 10 minutes.
Lower heat to 325°F. On a cutting board, cut the logs diagonally into 1/2-inch thick slices. Place cut side up back in the oven for an additional 5 minutes.
Flip cookies over and bake another 5 minutes. Remove from the sheet and let cool completely on a rack.
Yield: 20 to 25 biscotti.
